summary: Classified #60677 as the canonical implementation path for the #60274 imsg RPC tapback filtering bug. #60274 is covered by #60677 but closeout is blocked until the canonical fix path is landed or otherwise validated cleanly, because #60677 is still open and has failing checks in the hydrated artifact. #39322 and linked #39031 remain related feature-forwarding work, not duplicates of the filter-only bug.
